subject: A large winged bull-like creature — a lammasu — banking along the exterior of a stone building
description: A massive creature with the body of a bull, large bat-like or leathery wings spread wide, small horns, and glowing pale eyes is depicted in close three-quarter view against the flat stone exterior of a large building. The creature's wings extend beyond the frame in both directions. It has a thick, powerful body with dark fur, visible claws on the foot, and a feline or bovine face that looks slightly upward with an alert, calm expression. The building wall behind it is composed of large smooth ashlar stone blocks with rectangular window openings. The palette is almost entirely desaturated — grey stone, grey-brown fur, very muted — with the bright glowing white eyes providing the only strong highlight. The creature appears to be perching or banking alongside the building, not attacking it.
foreground: Winged bull-like lammasu creature in three-quarter view, claws visible, dark fur, glowing pale eyes
background: Smooth ashlar stone building exterior with rectangular windows
emotion: alert calm — watchful but not aggressive
